stories.title: Bangkok fire investigation finds locked doors and flammable decor as deaths climb to 30
stories.summary: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.

stories.title: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
stories.summary: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".

stories.title: Yemen's Houthis launch missiles at Saudi Arabia after strikes on Sanaa airport
stories.summary: The Iran-backed Houthis blame Saudi Arabia for the attack in Yemen's capital and say they targeted Abha airport in response.

stories.title: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
stories.summary: Police hope the images could jog memories that will help them find the body of Peter Falconio.

stories.title: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
stories.summary: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.

stories.title: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
stories.summary: The judge said the suit was brought for 'improper purposes' and referred a Trump attorney for possible disciplinary action.

stories.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
stories.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

stories.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
stories.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

stories.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
stories.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

stories.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
stories.summary: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

stories.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
stories.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.

stories.title: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
stories.summary: The Yen and Swiss Franc were stronger against the dollar as investors sought safe havens after Chinese start-up DeepSeek’s new AI model hit U.S. tech stocks.

stories.title: Consumer prices rose 3.5% annually in June, less than expected as energy prices eased
stories.summary: The consumer price index in June was expected to increase 3.8% from a year ago.

stories.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
stories.summary: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.

stories.title: 'Funflation' hits home: Why staying in isn't the cost-saver it used to be
stories.summary: Following a wave of price hikes, at-home pastimes like streaming movies or playing video games are pinching pocketbooks.

stories.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
stories.summary: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.

stories.title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
stories.summary: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.

stories.title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
stories.summary: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

stories.title: SpaceX is gearing up for Starship's 13th test flight later this week
stories.summary: This flight will put Starship under higher pressure and test out new Starlink satellites in orbit.

stories.title: US continues to shun Ebola-infected citizens; second American sent to Germany
stories.summary: The man is said to be doing well in a Frankfurt hospital.

stories.title: The US government warns that Russia state hackers are coming after your router

stories.title: Ukrainian drone strikes forced Russia to stop shipping in vital sea corridor
stories.summary: Ukraine’s drone blitz halted Russia’s Sea of Azov shipping in under a week.

stories.title: California creates $3,500 rebate for new electric vehicle buyers
stories.summary: There's a separate $1,750 rebate for used EVs, but both rebates have a price cap.

stories.title: Apple sues OpenAI after ex-engineer allegedly used bug to steal trade secrets
stories.summary: OpenAI accused of conspiring with former Apple employees to steal trade secrets.

stories.title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
stories.summary: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

stories.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
stories.summary: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?

stories.title: Humanity Protocol to prioritize operational security following $36M hack
stories.summary: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

stories.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
stories.summary: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

stories.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
stories.summary: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

stories.title: ECB picks 36 payment providers to test digital euro ahead of 2027 pilot
stories.summary: The European Central Bank will beta test a digital euro with 36 providers, including Revolut, after the project drew more than 50 applications.
